article_meta.title: Item 1 of 7 Texas State Troopers line up during a protest at the South Texas Family Residential Center, where Adrian Con

reasoning: The model mixed valid author-prose bias with clear errors: it flagged a quoted source phrase as author bias, misapplied a bias type to an already-attributed statement, and missed several notable instances of loaded author wording and framing.

custom_reasoning.attribution_rule_compliance: One clear attribution violation: it flagged Peltier’s quoted phrase (“driving while brown”) as author bias.
custom_reasoning.false_positive_rate: Half the items are not genuine author-level bias: a quoted phrase was flagged, and an attributed claim was mislabeled as lacking attribution.
custom_reasoning.false_negative_rate: Missed several prominent author-prose instances such as ‘SOARING NUMBER OF IMMIGRANT DETAINEES,’ ‘LANDSLIDE OF LAWSUITS,’ ‘drive to lock up more immigrants,’ ‘mass-deportation campaign,’ and ‘legal logjam.’
custom_reasoning.bias_type_accuracy: Labeling for ‘sweeping legal rebuke’ is debatable but defensible; ‘sheer scale... threatens to clog’ is reasonable. However, ‘Omission of Source Attribution’ was wrongly applied to an already-attributed statement.
